additional_metadata.organizer: dbt Labs' Amy Chen (Product Ecosystem Manager), Drew Banin (Co-Founder), Amanda Echeverría (Community)

events.agenda: 5:30-6:15pm Check-in, name tags, grab swag, mingling; 6:15-6:35pm Talk with Amy Chen; 6:35-6:45 Q&A; 6:45-7:05 Talk with Drew Banin; 7:05-7:15 Q&A; 7:15-8:30 Networking.
events.event_description: In the dbt Labs on dbt series, you'll learn how dbt Labs thinks about the role of data, how data developers collaborate with business leaders, and the technical decisions we've made in our own dbt project.
events.location: dbt Labs office, 915 Spring Garden St #500, Philadelphia, PA
events.raw_text: Thu, Jun 20, 2024, 5:30 PM to 8:30 PM EDT. Talk with Amy Chen (Product Ecosystem Manager, dbt Labs) on building a Snowflake Native App extending dbt Cloud into Snowflake, and Q&A with Drew Banin (Co-Founder, dbt Labs).

talks.description: Amy Chen discusses her experience as a technical stakeholder at dbt Labs, and how she built a Snowflake Native app that extends dbt Cloud into Snowflake.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 6:15-6:35pm Talk with Amy Chen (dbt Labs) ... Amy will share how they built a Snowflake Native app that extends dbt Cloud into Snowflake.
talks.title: dbt Labs on dbt: Amy Chen

talks.description: A talk with Drew Banin, Co-Founder of dbt Labs, followed by audience Q&A.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 6:45-7:05 Talk with Drew Banin (dbt Labs)6:45 Q&A
talks.title: dbt Labs on dbt: Drew Banin

events.agenda: Registration 5:30 PM; Networking 30 mins; Start with Introduction 6 pm; Speaker I - Andrew Sweet (dbt Labs) 25 mins; Q&A 5 mins; Speaker II - Olya Solomon, Yvonne Teng, Anna Ng (Slalom) 25 mins; Q&A 5 mins; Social, Food, Drink.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.location: Slalom Consulting, 100 N 18th St Suite 2000, Philadelphia, PA
events.raw_text: Wed, Apr 10, 2024, 5:30 PM to 8:00 PM EDT. Speaker I - Andrew Sweet (dbt Labs) - Deeper Dive into Column Level Lineage (CLL) and its Application in Data Modeling. Speaker II - Olya Solomon, Yvonne Teng, Anna Ng (Slalom) - Real life dbt application in modern Data & Analytics platform.

talks.description: A deeper dive into Column Level Lineage (CLL) and its application in data modeling.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Speaker I - Andrew Sweet (dbt Labs)- Deeper Dive into Column Level Lineage (CLL) and its Application in Data Modeling - 25 mins
talks.title: Deeper Dive into Column Level Lineage (CLL) and its Application in Data Modeling

talks.description: Real life dbt application in a modern Data & Analytics platform, based on Slalom's project delivery experience.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Speaker II - Olya Solomon, Yvonne Teng, Anna Ng (Slalom, Project Delivery Team) - Real life dbt application in modern Data & Analytics platform- 25 mins
talks.speaker_name: Olya Solomon, Yvonne Teng, Anna Ng
talks.title: Real life dbt application in modern Data & Analytics platform

events.agenda: 5:00 Check-in; 5:30 Introduction; 5:35 Social/Networking (expect to conclude by 8PM).
events.event_description: We are excited to bring Philly-based folks in the dbt Community together! Looking forward to socializing and seeing both new and familiar faces. This meetup will not feature content, but is rather an opportunity for folks to connect and build connections with other analytics engineers and data folks.
events.location: Slalom Consulting, 100 N 18th St Suite 2000, Philadelphia, PA
events.raw_text: Tue, Dec 19, 2023, 5:00 PM to 8:00 PM EST. This meetup will not feature content, but is rather an opportunity for folks to connect and build connections with other analytics engineers and data folks.

events.agenda: 5:00 Check-in; 5:30 Introduction; 5:35 dbt Labs Welcome and Overview; 6:00 Presentation 1 – Snowflake + dbt cloud overview/demo; 6:45 Presentation 2 – Empowering Analytical Data Ecosystems with dbt; 7:15 Social/Networking.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.location: Slalom Consulting, 100 N 18th St Suite 2000, Philadelphia, PA
events.raw_text: Wed, May 10, 2023, 5:00 PM to 8:00 PM EDT. 6:00 Presentation 1 – Vaishnavi Sridhar, Slalom – Snowflake + dbt cloud, overview/demo, best practices, Q&A. 6:45 Presentation 2 – Brandon Segal, Spotify - Empowering Analytical Data Ecosystems with dbt.

talks.description: How Spotify empowers its analytical data ecosystems using dbt.
